goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 memory canary dry-run 计划入口

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 memory canary dry-run 入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary.ts 只读 CLI/函数，复用 memory-candidates dry-run 的输出，只给 admission preview 通过的 user-prior-candidate 生成 future-only canary plan；trial-heuristic 和 prediction-eval 进入 excluded，不生成 canary。新增 focused tests 覆盖 accepted candidate 生成 canary、不改 memory audit、trial/eval 排除、缺表不建表；README 增加入口说明并更新 Spike D 状态。
summary.why: 上一轮已经能从 judged misses 生成 provisional user-prior candidate 草案，但还没有把候选如何用未来样本验证表达出来。Catty v0 的赌注要求 provisional memory 必须经过 future canary/dogfood 才能转正；本轮先建立无副作用的 canary 计划面，明确未来 judgement 数量、评估窗口、intent-weighted uplift 判准，以及过宽/nudge/helpfulness 护栏。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 memory canary dry-run 计划入口

decisions.chose: 只做 future canary plan dry-run，不写 Catty DB、不写用户 memory、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: v0 需要先把 canary 判准和污染护栏固化成可审计输出；持久队列、夜间反省和转正机制应作为后续独立切片。

decisions.chose: 复用 generateMemoryCandidateDryRun 的三类输出，而不是重新扫描 prediction 并重复分类。
decisions.rationale: candidate dry-run 已经负责区分 user-prior-candidate、trial-heuristic、prediction-eval；canary 层只应给 admitted candidate 加 future validation plan，避免分类口径分叉。

decisions.chose: 计划要求 future-only 样本、默认 14 天窗口、至少 3 条未来 judgement、intent-weighted score 提升，并且 broad prediction rate / nudge reports 不升、visible helpfulness 不降。
decisions.rationale: 这些对应 catty-v0-plan 的五支柱，防止 memory 因 hit-rate shortcut 或 nudging 污染而被误判为有效。

decisions.chose: 把已有 Catty proposed intents 视为同一分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 前序 intents 分别完成 trail、judge、runtime、store、shadow CLI、judge-record、report 和 memory candidate；本轮在其后补 canary dry-run，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 直接把 canary plan 持久化为队列表
rejected.reason: 当前还没有 canary runner 或 promotion gate；先持久化会制造未消费状态和误导性的完成感。

rejected.alternative: 给 trial heuristic 或 prediction-eval 也生成 canary
rejected.reason: trial heuristic 和 eval 数据不能走 user-prior memory 的验证通道，否则会把 app shortcut / 过宽预测当成更像用户本人。

rejected.alternative: 把 canary 接入每分钟 heartbeat
rejected.reason: 会把调度、真实模型、写库和污染控制一次性引入，超出本轮最小可验证边界。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-canary.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-canary 模块。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/memory-canary.test.ts，2 pass，13 expect。
验证通过：Catty focused tests，16 pass，102 expect。
验证通过：bun test，27 pass，139 expect。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary.ts --help 输出预期 usage。
live read-only smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary.ts --date 2026-05-27 返回 0 plans，没有写 live DB。
写入边界 smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary.ts --write 以 exit 2 拒绝写入。
临时 SQLite 非空 CLI smoke：返回 1 个 canary plan，summary.planned=1，包含 future_samples_only / broad/nudge/helpfulness guardrails。
提交 c893c80 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary.ts、src/catty/memory-canary.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty，未 stage、未提交。

architectural_claims: Catty v0 can now express how admitted provisional memory candidates should be tested on future samples before promotion.
Canary planning is read-only and layered on top of memory-candidates dry-run, so candidate classification has a single source of truth.
Trial heuristics and prediction eval data are explicitly excluded from user-prior canary plans.
The canary plan encodes anti-drift guardrails rather than only a hit-rate uplift criterion.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary.ts emits dry-run JSON for the current UTC date by default.
--date filters source candidate drafts by prediction date; --store-db selects the SQLite store; --max caps source candidate count.
Accepted user-prior candidates get canary plans with startsAfter, evaluationWindowDays, requiredFutureJudgements, successCriteria, and guardrails.
Trial-heuristic and prediction-eval drafts appear in excluded with reasons and do not get canary plans.
--write is rejected; the command has no DB write path.
security_implications: memory-canary.ts reads only through memory-candidates / SqliteCattyStore paths and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command has no --pi path and performs no model calls.
The command is dry-run only; --write is rejected and no user memory, Catty audit state, or canary queue state is written.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; no canary table is created in this slice.
Existing shadow, judge-record, report, memory-candidates, runtime, and store APIs are unchanged.
